rationale.R1.3: The agent correctly identifies that the evidence does not support some of the claims made in the text.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims, but could benefit from a more nuanced discussion of confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within the requested scope, but there are minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies no harmful content or regressions in the text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any information about the provenance and traceability of the claims.
